channel.title: Source: Add params to postTypes
channel.description:
<!-- Please, follow this template in order to be as efficient as possible. Before opening a new feature, please check that it hasn't been already added. -->
## Description <!-- Try to give a detailed explanation of what do you expect of this feature --> Frontity allows for a `params` attribute on `source` like: ``` packages: [ ... { name: "@frontity/wp-source", state: { source: { api: "https://mysite.com/wp-json", params: { orderby: "slug", order: "asc", per_page: "99" }, ... ```
We would like to be able to add `params` also for `postTypes`, like:
``` ... postsPage: "/news", postTypes: [ { type: "quote", endpoint: "quote", archive: "/quote", params: { orderby: "date", order: "asc", per_page: "7" } } ] ... ```
This feature is [based on a feature that was missing for a user.](https://community.frontity.org/t/wp-source-params-not-working-as-expected/1242/8)
## Examples <!-- Do you know examples that could inspire the community? Let us know! -->
## Possible solution <!-- If you have already thought of a possible solution, let us know! -->

item.title: Source: Add params to postTypes
item.dc:creator: myduiattorney127
item.description:
I will add this code, frontity.settings.js, but not working! Why? Please help.

“params”: {
per_page: 20,
order: ‘desc’,
type: [‘attorneytestimonials’]
},

Read full topic

item.title: Source: Add params to postTypes
item.dc:creator: jeff
item.description:
Hi guys,

Is there an update on this?

Thanks

Read full topic

item.title: Source: Add params to postTypes
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
I think this could be implemented the same way it’s already implemented for taxonomies (see frontity/packages/wp-source/src/libraries/handlers/taxonomy.ts).

Read full topic

item.title: Source: Add params to postTypes
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Description

Frontity allows for a params attribute on source like:

packages: [
    ...
    {
      name: "@frontity/wp-source",
      state: {
        source: {
          api: "https://mysite.com/wp-json",
          params: {
            orderby: "slug",
            order: "asc",
            per_page: "99"
          },
...

We would like to be able to add params also for postTypes, like:

          ...
          postsPage: "/news",
          postTypes: [
            {
              type: "quote",
              endpoint: "quote",
              archive: "/quote",
              params: {
                orderby: "date",
                order: "asc",
                per_page: "7"
              }
            }
          ]
...

This feature is based on a feature that was missing for a user.

Examples

Possible solution

Read full topic
